description_long: This is a large, two-story log cabin constructed primarily from rounded timber logs, featuring a prominent gabled roof with deep overhangs and a wide, wraparound wooden deck. The front facade is dominated by tall, multi-pane windows and a set of double doors, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The roof is covered with wooden shingles and includes multiple intersecting gables, adding architectural interest and providing additional attic space. The cabin's exterior walls are made of horizontally stacked logs with visible corner notching, giving it a traditional rustic appearance. The side and rear views reveal additional windows of varying sizes, and a garage structure is attached to one side, seamlessly integrated into the overall design. The deck is supported by wooden posts and features a simple railing, providing outdoor living space and enhancing the cabin's connection to its surroundings.
description: A spacious, two-story log cabin with a gabled shingle roof, large windows, and a wraparound wooden deck. The structure features rustic log walls, intersecting rooflines, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance with double doors, tall windows, and the expansive wooden deck extending across the facade.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the complex, intersecting gabled roof structure and the full extent of the deck wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: The side view reveals additional windows, the log wall construction, and the attached garage with its own roofline.
description_view_3: The rear angled view displays the continuation of the deck, more windows, and the depth of the overhanging roof.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with multiple intersecting gables, deep overhangs, and wooden shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple large rectangular windows on the front facade arranged symmetrically in vertical pairs, additional smaller windows on the side, all with wooden frames and a regular, balanced distribution
attribute_door_placement: double doors centered on the front facade beneath the main gable, single garage door on the right side integrated into the side wall
